results.rendered_html:
1. añc (connected with √ac, q.v.) cl. 1. P. Ā. añcati, ˚te, ānañca, ˚ce, añciṣyati, ˚te, añcitum, to bend, curve, incline, curl;
to reverence (with inclined body), to honour;
to tend, move, go, wander about;
to request,  L.  : cl. 10. or Caus. añcayati, to unfold, make clear, produce. Desid. P. Ā. añciciṣati, ˚te, to be desirous of bending:
Pass. añcyate or acyate, to be bent.
